caveats: Curated register across listed peers AND private/unlisted developers with pending NRC or DOE-authorization status. Large-LWR new build is excluded by design (AP1000-class rows appear only where a listed peer owns the project). Stages follow public NRC dockets, Federal Register notices and company disclosures; confidence H/M/L per row — H rows verified against primary sources Jul 2026. DOE-authorization rows are federal-site paths, not NRC licences. Design-certification rows end at Granted by nature. N links the NRC hub; E (listed rows) the issuer’s EDGAR filings. Maintained with the weekly research pass — automatic ADAMS/EDGAR diff flagging is on the roadmap.

items.note: First COLA denied Jan 2022; re-engaged via pre-application, phased COLA resubmission underway (phase 1 submitted 2025). DOE reactor-pilot selectee for fuel-line work.
Fuel line at INL using recovered EBR-II material; proceeds under DOE site authorization, not an NRC Part 70 licence. Approvals to proceed 2024-25.
Design certification final rule effective Feb 2023 — first SMR design certified in the US. Design-cert track ends at Granted; deployment licensing is site-specific.
Standard design approval application submitted Jan 2023; NRC approval 2025. RoPower (Romania) FEED runs off this design.
Construction permit application submitted Mar 2025 and docketed — first advanced-reactor CP application at an industrial site. Grid: ERCOT.
Fuel fabrication facility licence application submitted Apr 2022, docketed and under NRC review.
Licensed and operating — naval and research reactor fuel; decades-running Category I facility.
Nuclear Fuel Services subsidiary — licensed, operating; HEU downblending and naval fuel.
DoD Strategic Capabilities Office transportable microreactor; built, moving through testing at INL under federal authorization rather than NRC licence.
HALEU demonstration cascade operating since Oct 2023 under amended licence; first US HALEU production.
Design certified and renewed; deployed at Vogtle. Cameco exposure via 49% Westinghouse stake with Brookfield.
Source-material licences; production restarted 2024. Texas ISR assets run under agreement-state regulation.
NRC pre-application engagement opened 2024-25; no docketed application yet.
Fuel development with INL under GAIN/DOE agreements; NRC licensing would follow a lead-fuel-assembly path later this decade.
US NRC pre-application engagement; CNSC (Canada) vendor design review phase 2 completed — strongest non-US regulatory footing in the set.
Early regulatory engagement stated; verify docket activity before relying on stage.
Combined licence application for multi-unit AP1000 campus submitted 2025; docketing status to verify. Hyperscale-adjacent load thesis.
DOE reactor-pilot programme selectee (2025) — federal-site authorization path available alongside eventual NRC track.
Industrial-scale TRISO from ex-USNC assets; NRC fuel-facility licensing intended, pre-licensing today.
Very early; treat stage as directional until a docket exists.
Construction permits granted Dec 2023 and Nov 2024 — first non-LWR CPs in 50 years; Hermes 1 under construction. Google master agreement backs the commercial fleet.
CPA submitted Mar 2024, docketed May 2024, under active NRC review; sodium-cooled fast reactor with storage. Gates-backed; site works underway on non-nuclear scope.

CPA Part 1 with limited work authorization submitted 31 Dec 2025; NRC accepted for review Feb 2026, Part 2 due by mid-2027. $400M DOE Tier-1 award. Holtec Nuclear Corp S-1 filed — IPO pending, watch for listing.
Docketed Jul 2025; NRC staff safety evaluation (Jun 2026, ML26168A505) recommends issuing the permit — the furthest-advanced SMR CPA in the US, decision imminent.
Construction permit granted Sep 2024 — first US liquid-fuelled reactor CP; university research deployment building toward MSR-1.
DOE reactor-pilot selectee targeting federal-site fuelled test; extensive NRC pre-application file. Cameco holds 49% of Westinghouse (CCJ exposure).
First slot in NRIC DOME fuelled-test queue under DOE authorization; test targeted 2026. Fuel loading approvals progressing.
DOE reactor-pilot selectee; extra-modular design for data-centre campuses, federal-site authorization path.
DOE reactor-pilot selectee; portable microreactor test unit on the federal authorization track.
NRC pre-application engagement opened 2025 for multi-unit micro-PWR fleet plan in Texas.
Isotope-production reactors; DOE pilot cohort with NRC intent stated — verify docket activity before relying on stage.
DOE reactor-pilot selectee; early-stage test unit, federal-site path.
Full licence application docketed 4 Aug 2025 (docket 70-7033); draft EIS issued Mar 2026, comments to May 2026. Laser re-enrichment of DOE tails to 8 w/o — Silex technology, Cameco 49%.
Site selected and licensing intent announced for new centrifuge enrichment capacity; NRC application in preparation.
DOE site agreement announced for HALEU production at Paducah; NRC application not yet filed — directional.
Fusion-driven subcritical isotope plant; NRC operating licence granted 2023, Mo-99 production ramping. Recycling ambitions filed separately at concept stage.

Formal NRC pre-application docket 99902137 open; Part 50 CP+OL strategy stated, CPA targeted 2027. Shipyard-prefabricated plant architecture around GE Vernova Hitachi BWRX-300; phased gas-to-nuclear ~1→1.5 GW for a Crusoe data-centre campus; $380M raised 2026, Constellation Technology Ventures invested Jul 2026.

Regulatory engagement plan filed with NRC 15 Apr 2026, opening pre-application toward a construction permit. 240 MWe / 600 MWt lead-bismuth-cooled fast reactor — the only lead-family design in the US and the closest technological neighbour to newcleo’s LFR. Closed-fuel-cycle energy park in Indiana on MOX/TRU from DOE stockpiles (HALEU-flexible); AtkinsRéalis EPCM alliance; FFTF/EBR-II heritage team; power targeted 2033.

Out of stealth Feb 2026 (Newport, RI): molten-salt electrochemical recycling of used fuel plus strontium-90 long-duration power sources. ARPA-E award with INL; PNNL proof-of-concept produced; ex-NRC Chair Christopher Hanson involved. No NRC application yet — recycling-adjacent to the MOX thesis.
